title: PSG BOOST
description:
🥔 PSG BOOST – Optimized Minecraft for Potato PCs 🚀
Enjoy smooth, lag-free gameplay and higher FPS even on low-end PCs with this easy-to-use performance modpack.
body:
PSG BOOST – Minecraft Performance Modpack for Low-End PCs

PSG BOOST is a performance-focused Minecraft modpack designed for low-end or potato PCs. I created this modpack by compiling and redistributing carefully selected performance mods (all made by their original creators) to help players enjoy smooth gameplay, higher FPS, and reduced lag without sacrificing the fun of Minecraft.

This pack includes essential performance mods, optimized settings, and automatic tweaks that:

⚡ Boost FPS for smoother gameplay
🧹 Optimize memory and resources for low-spec computers
🛠️ Simplify installation – just drop the modpack into your launcher and play
🎯 Maintain compatibility with multiple Minecraft versions

Whether you’re playing on an older laptop or a modest desktop, PSG BOOST makes Minecraft run faster and more stable. The mods included were created by their original developers, while I curated and redistributed them in this optimized modpack for the best experience on limited hardware.
